# pi-agent-go

> Minimal Go agent framework for LLM tool-calling loops. Single-loop agent on top of pi-llm-go: input → optional tool calls → response → repeat until done. Typed tool handlers with reflection-derived JSON schemas, parallel tool execution, three hooks for control, streaming tool progress, mid-run steering, snapshot-based resume. Works with Anthropic Claude, OpenAI (GPT-5 family), Google Gemini, and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint through pi-llm-go. Go 1.25+.

## Install

```
go get github.com/amit-timalsina/pi-agent-go
```

## Core types

- `agent.Agent` — owns the loop. Created via `New(Config)`; driven via `Run(ctx, prompt)` or `RunMessage(ctx, llm.Message)`.
- `agent.Config` — `LLM`, `Model`, `SystemPrompt`, `Tools`, `MaxIterations`, `Temperature`, `MaxTokens`, `Thinking`, `CacheRetention` (forwarded to every iteration's `llm.Request` for Anthropic prompt caching), hooks, `ToolExecution`, `ToolDeltaBuffer`, `DefaultMaxSummarySize`, `TransformContext` (per-iteration message-slice transform).
- `agent.Agent` methods — `Run` / `RunMessage`, `Steer`, `Snapshot`, `Reset`, `SetSystemPrompt` / `SystemPrompt` (dynamic prompt for long-running agents).
- `agent.AgentTool` — embeds `llm.Tool` + a `Handler`. Constructed via `agent.Typed[I, O]` (schema from reflection) or `agent.Raw` (hand-written schema).
- `agent.Result` — what a tool handler returns: `Summary` (text the model sees, bounded by MaxSummarySize), optional `FullPayloadHint` (caller-defined locator the model can retrieve later), and `Terminate` (skip the follow-up LLM call when the tool's output IS the final answer; AND-reduced across a parallel batch).
- `agent.AgentEvent` — sealed sum emitted by `Run`: `EventRunStart`, `EventIterationStart`, `EventLLMStream`, `EventAssistantMessage`, `EventSteering`, `EventToolStart`, `EventToolDelta`, `EventToolEnd`, `EventRunEnd`.

## Hooks

Three hooks, all synchronous, all error-returning:

- `BeforeToolCall(ctx, RunContext, ToolCallInfo) (skip bool, errorResult string, err error)` — runs before every tool call; can skip with a custom error result; hook error aborts the run.
- `AfterToolCall(ctx, RunContext, ToolCallInfo, Result, isErr bool) (*Result, error)` — runs after every tool call; can override the result; hook error aborts.
- `OnSteering(ctx, RunContext, llm.Message) (drop bool, err error)` — runs when a steering message is dequeued; can drop it.

Concurrency under `ToolExecution = ToolExecutionParallel`: `AfterToolCall` may run concurrently across in-flight tools. `BeforeToolCall` stays sequential in source order even in parallel mode. `OnSteering` is never concurrent with itself or other hooks.

## Common usage patterns

### Calculator agent (one tool, Anthropic)

```go
type AddArgs struct {
    A int `json:"a" jsonschema:"description=first addend"`
    B int `json:"b" jsonschema:"description=second addend"`
}
addTool := agent.Typed[AddArgs, int]("add", "Add two integers.",
    func(ctx context.Context, in AddArgs) (int, error) { return in.A + in.B, nil },
    func(sum int) string { return fmt.Sprintf("%d", sum) },
)
a, _ := agent.New(agent.Config{
    LLM: provider, Model: anthropic.ClaudeSonnet4_6,
    SystemPrompt: "You are a calculator. Use the add tool.",
    Tools: []agent.AgentTool{addTool}, MaxTokens: 1024,
})
for event, err := range a.Run(ctx, "what is 137+84?") {
    if err != nil { return err }
    // type-switch on event for the granularity you need
}
```

### Parallel tool execution

```go
agent.New(agent.Config{
    // ...
    ToolExecution: agent.ToolExecutionParallel,
})
// Source order preserved for tool_result blocks AND for the BeforeToolCall
// hook. Handlers run concurrently. Source-order vs finish-order matters
// when multiple tools are called in one assistant turn.
```

### Streaming tool progress

```go
shellTool := agent.Raw("shell", "Run a shell command.", schema,
    func(ctx context.Context, args json.RawMessage) (agent.Result, error) {
        // emit progress as lines arrive; the model NEVER sees these
        for scanner.Scan() {
            agent.EmitToolDelta(ctx, scanner.Text())
        }
        return agent.Result{Summary: collected}, nil
    },
)
// Observers see EventToolDelta between EventToolStart and EventToolEnd.
// Non-blocking under parallel: drops on overflow. Tune Config.ToolDeltaBuffer.
```

### Mid-run steering

```go
go func() {
    time.Sleep(time.Second)
    a.Steer(ctx, llm.Message{
        Role: llm.RoleUser,
        Content: []llm.Block{llm.TextBlock{Text: "actually, do X instead"}},
    })
}()
// Drained at the next iteration boundary; buffered channel (capacity 16).
```

### Snapshot / resume

```go
snap := a.Snapshot()                          // immutable copy of run state
// persist `snap` (JSON, Postgres row, S3 object, whatever)
a2, _ := agent.Restore(cfg, snap)             // reconstruct after process restart
for event, err := range a2.Run(ctx, prompt) { /* ... */ }
```

### Run context inside a handler

```go
agent.Typed[Args, Out]("name", "...",
    func(ctx context.Context, in Args) (Out, error) {
        runID := agent.RunIDFromContext(ctx)  // for span correlation
        agent.EmitToolDelta(ctx, "starting")  // streaming progress
        // ... work ...
        return result, nil
    }, serialize,
)
```

## Sibling library

- [pi-llm-go](https://github.com/amit-timalsina/pi-llm-go) — the LLM client this agent is built on. Provider-agnostic streaming completions for Anthropic / OpenAI / Gemini.

## Examples directory

- [examples/hello_agent](examples/hello_agent) — end-to-end calculator tool agent.
- [examples/multi_tool](examples/multi_tool) — multiple tools in one config.
- [examples/with_hooks](examples/with_hooks) — BeforeToolCall + AfterToolCall + OnSteering.
- [examples/steering](examples/steering) — `Steer()` injecting mid-run messages.
- [examples/snapshot_resume](examples/snapshot_resume) — `Snapshot()` + `Restore()` across a simulated process restart.
- [examples/bounded_results](examples/bounded_results) — `MaxSummarySize` + `FullPayloadHint` for tools with large outputs.
- [examples/terminate_early](examples/terminate_early) — `Result.Terminate` skipping the follow-up LLM call.
- [examples/observability](examples/observability) — OpenTelemetry span + slog wiring over the AgentEvent iterator.
- [examples/streaming_tool](examples/streaming_tool) — `EmitToolDelta` surfacing tool progress.

## Versioning and stability

Stable as of **v1.0.0**. Follows semver strictly: no breaking change without a major-version (module-path) bump per Go's major-version policy. New optional `Config` fields, new `AgentEvent` variants, and new methods on concrete types are minor releases; adding a method to a public interface would be major. Every change documented in CHANGELOG.md. Dogfooded in production at Noumenal since May 2026 (additive-only API since v0.2.0).

MIT. Attribution to upstream `pi-agent` (Mario Zechner, MIT) in LICENSE and README.
